constitutional_claims: Gap #2 closed: data_freshness in picks.metadata now computed from evaluateProviderDataFreshness().staleAtScanTime — not hardcoded 'fresh'
Gap #19 closed: CircuitBreaker.failClosed option added; throws CircuitOpenError when open (opt-in, backward-compatible)
Gap #49 closed: ProviderQuarantineRegistry implemented; auto-triggered in ingest-league on CircuitOpenError
Adversarial proof: null snapshotAt → data_freshness: 'stale' (no silent fresh default)
Adversarial proof: circuit open in fail-closed mode throws, does not degrade silently
Quarantine is idempotent: second quarantine call for same provider is a no-op
All structured audit events emitted as JSON with event/providerKey/reason fields
